concerns.text: FR-003 and US-2 require 'Yeo 7-network atlas DMN component masks' for ROI extraction, but T019 implements 'AAL atlas DMN nodes (PCC, mPFC, IPL, Angular Gyrus)'. This is a spec-to-task mismatch: the task does not cover the specified FR. Either update T019 to use Yeo atlas or update spec to match AAL (but plan.md also uses AAL, creating spec-plan-constitution conflict).

Constitution Principle I requires 'Random seeds MUST be pinned in code/' for reproducibility. No task explicitly addresses random seed configuration or pinning implementation. Foundational tasks T004-T008 cover config, logging, schema, env, checksum but not seed pinning. Add task for seed pinning in src/utils/random.py or equivalent.

Constitution Principle V requires 'Every artifact under this project carries a content hash' recorded in state/projects/*.yaml. T008 implements 'file checksum verification' but does not cover recording content hashes to the project state file. Add task for content hash recording infrastructure.
